name: Acai Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Acai Powder is berry nutrition at its best! Loaded with antioxidants and healthy fats that support strong skin, hair and nails, this Amazonian “beauty berry" is the perfect addition to your acai bowls, smoothies & more.

name: Baker's Bundle
description_html: Baking with premium quality cacao is a superfood treat! Our Cacao Powder, Semi-sweet Cacao Wafers, Cacao Nibs and Cacao Butter Wafers are the perfect pantry set to bring ethically-sourced, nutrient-rich cacao to all of your baked goods.

name: Bittersweet Cacao Wafers
description_html: Our Bittersweet Cacao Wafers will meet all your dark chocolate needs with their convenient shape and rich, velvety texture. 70% cacao perfect for baking, melting or snacking straight from the bag!

name: Cacao Butter
description_html: Decadent, creamy and cocoa-scented, Navitas Organics Cacao Butter is a superfood staple. This plant-based fat is an essential ingredient in homemade chocolate, a luscious addition to hot cocoa and baking, and melts at body temperature—perfect for DIY skincare!

name: Cacao Nibs
description_html: Navitas Organics Cacao Nibs are a superfood powerhouse. Straight up cacao bean bits—high in antioxidants, fiber and minerals—they're perfect for smoothies, trail mix, baking, ice cream or as an unsweetened cacao snack straight out of the bag!

name: Cacao Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics unsweetened Cacao Powder is packed with nutrients and a rich chocolate taste! This pure organic cacao powder is delicious in brownies, cakes, hot cocoa, smoothies & more.

name: Cacao Sweet Nibs
description_html: Navitas Organics Cacao Sweet Nibs are our best-selling cacao nibs rolled in just a touch of organic cane sugar. This dark chocolate, superfood nib is great for baking, smoothies, yogurt or hot cereal—or devoured straight from the bag! For a less sweet option, try our Cacao Nibs!

name: Cacao Wafers
description_html: Navitas Organics Cacao Wafers are unsweetened baking chocolate—perfect for all your chocolatey baking and dessert needs! Organic and Fairtrade certified, they're the most premium and socially responsible baking chocolate around.

name: Camu Powder
description_html: Camu Camu is a Peruvian berry famous for its immune-boosting benefits. Mix Navitas Organics Camu Powder into your juices, smoothies or oatmeal for a tart berry boost that packs in the vitamin C!

name: Chia Seed Powder
description_html: Made from 100% cold-milled chia seeds, Navitas Organics Chia Powder packs in the omega-3s, fiber and minerals. With a mild, nutty flavor, it’s the perfect vegan egg replacement and superfood boost for smoothies, soups, baking, and more!

name: Chia Seeds
description_html: Navitas Organics Chia Seeds are your ticket to maximum omega-3 fatty acids! You can add these tiny protein- and fiber-packed seeds to oatmeal, smoothies, yogurt, and countless recipes for a nutritious boost.

name: Fan-favorite Superfood+ BITES Bundle
description_html: Get your snack fix with this convenient bundle! Featuring all four classic flavors of our Superfood+ BITES, this nutritious snack pack makes healthy snacking easy and delicious. Each bite delivers plant-based energy, superfood nutrition and crave-worthy flavor—perfect for fueling your day on the go.

name: Goji Berries
description_html: An ancient superfood, Goji Berries have been used for over 2,000 years to promote vitality and longevity—thanks to their high levels of antioxidants. Whether you're snacking, baking or breakfast-ing, enjoy these chewy, sweet-savory red gems as your everyday, healthy dried fruit!

name: Goji Powder
description_html: Our berry-sweet and slightly savory Goji Berry Powder is packed with antioxidant vitamin A and blends perfectly into smoothies, yogurt, vinaigrettes, dessert batters and more!

name: Golden Turmeric Latte
description_html: Navitas Organics instant Golden Turmeric Latte Mix is our favorite warming wellness ritual. Made of organic turmeric, fragrant spices like ginger powder and black pepper, and creamy coconut oil powder, it’s a feel-good superfood treat that's a breeze to make—just add hot milk or water or pour over ice & enjoy!

name: Goldenberries
description_html: Sweet, tart and unexpectedly addictive, goldenberries are our go-to dried fruit for a bright burst of antioxidants, minerals and fiber. They're an easy, nutritious snack and add a pop of sunshine to a variety of recipes. A superfruit secret...if you know, you know!

name: Hemp Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Hemp Protein Powder brings the plant-based protein to the table. At 13 grams of protein per serving and with a mild, nutty flavor, it’s great for smoothies, protein bars, or wherever you want extra nutrition.

name: Hemp Seeds
description_html: Navitas Organics Hemp Seeds are one of our most popular superfood staples—and for good reason! A rare plant-based source of complete protein and omega-3s, these creamy, nutty seeds are the perfect nutritional boost for any sweet or savory dish. Try them in yogurt, salad, oatmeal or baked goods.

name: Maca Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Maca Powder is your superfood source for resiliency, energy and system balance. A Peruvian adaptogen with a malty, caramel flavor, it’s a delicious addition to smoothies, hot cocoa, lattes, and a variety of baked goods. Gelatinized for digestabiliy.

name: Maqui Powder
description_html: The maqui berry is a superfood superstar, with far more antioxidants than most berries. Navitas Organics Maqui Powder has a deep purple hue and a tart berry flavor—perfect for smoothies, oatmeal, energy bites and more. Our organic maqui berry powder is made from 100% wildcrafted maqui berries, sustainably sourced from southern Chile.

name: Matcha Latte
description_html: Navitas Organics instant Matcha Latte Mix is your superfood shortcut to an energized, grounded morning. Made of premium matcha with coconut creamer and a touch of sweetness, it's nutritious, dairy-free and delicious to boot. Just add hot water or milk of choice or pour over ice & enjoy!

name: Matcha Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Matcha Powder is premium culinary grade and organically grown in its native Japan. Smooth and earthy, it’s perfect for making a traditional cup of tea, whipping up a frothy matcha latte, or adding to your favorite smoothies and desserts!

name: Mulberries
description_html: Navitas Organics Mulberries are an everyday superfood staple! These dried berries are sweet, chewy and nutrient-dense. Snack on them, bake with them, mix them in everywhere!﻿

name: New Flavor Superfood+ BITES Bundle
description_html: Sample all three of the newest flavors of our Superfood+ BITES with this crave-worthy snack set. Think creamy matcha latte, vibrant acai bowl & peanut-butter-meets-chocolate perfection—each made with nutrient-dense, 100% organic ingredients.

name: Pomegranate Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Pomegranate Powder is a sweet, easy way to get all of pomegranate's antioxidants with none of the hard work! Add a spoonful of this 100% organic pomegranate juice powder to your smoothies, yogurt or oatmeal for an everyday superfood boost.

name: Semi-sweet Cacao Wafers
description_html: Navitas Organics Semi-sweet Cacao Wafers are perfect for baking, melting, snacking & more! 60% cacao and lightly sweetened with coconut sugar, these will become your new go-to chocolate.

name: Stress Reducer Bundle
description_html: Keep your calm with our Stress Reducer Bundle! Combining supportive adaptogens—like maca, reishi mushroom and ashwagandha—with calming cacao and turmeric, this collection of powerful superfoods will have your back in times of stress.

name: Superberry Bundle
description_html: Snack your way to wellness with our trio of superfood berries! With loads of nutrition and flavor to spare, these organic, premium quality berries will brighten up your trail mix, baked goods, salads and more. No added sugar, sulfites, or vegetable oils.

name: Superfood+ Adaptogen Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Adaptogen Blend is a convenient mix of nature’s best adaptogens—maca, reishi mushroom and ashwagandha. Add this adaptogen powder to any smoothie to help your body stay energized and resilient!

name: Superfood+ Berry Acai BITES
description_html: Berry good for you and 100% organic, our Superfood+ Berry Acai BITES deliver long-lasting energy & delicious flavor in a convenient, grab-and-go form. Date-sweetened and packed with nuts, seeds, berries & superfoods.

name: Superfood+ Berry Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Berry Blend is a powerful mix of nature's most antioxidant-rich berries—acai, goji and blueberry—in a convenient powdered form. Just add to your favorite smoothies and go!

name: Superfood+ Blueberry Hemp BITES
description_html: Blueberry muffin vibes and feel-good ingredients make Superfood+ Blueberry Hemp BITES a natural choice for any time of day. Sweetened with dates and packed with nuts, seeds, superfoods & real, organic dried blueberries.

name: Superfood+ Cacao Goji BITES
description_html: Bursting with rich chocolate and bright berry flavors, Superfood+ Cacao Goji BITES make your healthiest choices simple, delicious & organic. Sweetened with dates, boosted with superfoods, and packed with organic, dark chocolate chips.

name: Superfood+ Chocolate Brownie BITES
description_html: Our Superfood+ Chocolate Brownie BITES are made with 100% organic cacao powder & dark chocolate chips in a date, seed & superfood base. This decadent brownie bite will satisfy & nourish without compromising your health goals!

name: Superfood+ Digestive Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Digestive Blend is not only good for you, it’s good to you. Made from four organic, whole food powders—prune, banana, Irish sea moss & aloe vera—it naturally supports and soothes the digestive system from top to bottom.

name: Superfood+ Greens Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Greens Blend is a nutritious mix of moringa, kale and wheatgrass powders. Add this blend of alkalizing, nutritious greens to support your body's detox system and overall best health. This greens blend superfood contains a healthy mix of nutrients that supports overall wellness.

name: Superfood+ Immunity Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Immunity Blend combines three vitamin C powerhouses for whole food immune support designed by Mother Nature. Add this convenient mix of camu berry, orange and acerola cherry powders to any smoothie for bright, citrusy fortification.

name: Superfood+ Lemon Cashew Matcha BITES
description_html: Tangy lemon, creamy cashew & a hint of vanilla is a matcha made in heaven! Puns aside, our date-sweetened Superfood+ Lemon Cashew Matcha BITES are serious about their organic, whole-food ingredients & energizing superfood boosts.

name: Superfood+ Salted Peanut Chocolate BITES
description_html: Packed with the classic flavor combo of creamy peanut butter & dark chocolate, you’d never guess our 100% organic Superfood+ Salted Peanut Chocolate BITES are sweetened with dates & boosted with superfoods for feel-good nourishment any time of day!

name: Superfood+ Sea Veggie Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Sea Veggie Blend brings oceanic nutrition to your everyday routine! Containing three varieties of seaweed, this powerful powder is bursting with marine minerals and umami flavor. It’s a perfect addition to smoothies, sauces, soups & more.

name: Superfood+ Strawberry Peanut Chia BITES
description_html: Enjoy classic PB&J flavor with our 100% organic Superfood+ Strawberry Peanut Chia BITES! Made with creamy peanut butter chips & freeze-dried strawberry, you'll want to be sure these date-sweetened bites are never far from reach.

name: Superfood+ Trail Mix Antioxidant Blend
description_html: Organic trail mix made super! We’ve combined 3 of our signature superberries—mulberries, goji berries & goldenberries—with creamy cashews, roasted pumpkin seeds, crunchy cacao nibs & banana for delicious flavor, lasting energy & superfood nutrition in every bite of this superfood trail mix.

name: Superfood+ Tri-Seed Powder Blend
description_html: Navitas Organics Superfood+ Tri-Seed Powder Blend combines three of the most nutritious foods on the planet—flax, chia & hemp—in one convenient superfood seed powder for an easy boost of fiber, omega-3s, protein & minerals in your smoothies, baked goods & more!

name: Toppers Bundle
description_html: Our topper trifecta of Chia seeds, Cacao Nibs and Hemp Seeds will elevate every smoothie bowl to superfood status and add texture, flavor and loads of nutrition to each toothsome bite. Sprinkle, stripe & swirl. Who said you shouldn't play with your food?!

name: Turmeric Powder
description_html: Navitas Organics Turmeric Powder is organically cultivated and ethically sourced. This renowned inflammation buster offers a robust peppery and earthy flavor and is endlessly versatile—great in golden milk lattes, savory curry and rice dishes, tropical smoothies, soups, veggie dishes…you get the idea.
